hooks.command: cd "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-/Users/sbobba/projects/portfolio}" || exit 0; [ -z "$(git status --porcelain -- src astro.config.mjs wrangler.jsonc 2>/dev/null)" ] && exit 0; npm run build > /tmp/portfolio-build.log 2>&1 && exit 0; osascript -e 'display notification "astro build is failing - see /tmp/portfolio-build.log" with title "Portfolio build"' 2>/dev/null; echo '{"systemMessage":"WARNING: astro build is failing - see /tmp/portfolio-build.log"}'
